Hero.title: Hi, I am
Hero.description: Systems Engineer with 4 years of experience building Full Stack applications with Java, Node.js, Next.js and Angular. I have contributed to enterprise platform modernization through microservices, SQL to NoSQL migrations and AWS solutions. Currently developing SaaS platforms, third-party integrations and AI-powered features.
Hero.subdescription: I am not afraid of new challenges or emerging technologies, I adapt quickly to any environment and am always willing to contribute with commitment, a positive attitude, and continuous learning to the teams that place their trust in me.

About.title: About
About.subtitle: me
About.hint: A summary of my professional profile. Click each card to see more details.

card1.title: Experience
texts: Creztu S.A.S (Dec 2024 – Present): Full Stack development with Next.js, Vue.js, NestJS and Express. AI for website generation with Craft.js, AWS architecture (S3, CloudFront, DynamoDB), Wompi, ePayco and Stripe payment gateways.
WYER (Jul 2022 – Nov 2024): monolith to micro-apps migration with Angular 14, Java backend (Jakarta EE, Hibernate), REST APIs and PostgreSQL → DynamoDB migration.
Active use of AI tools: Cursor, GitHub Copilot and ChatGPT to accelerate development and refactoring.

card2.title: Education
texts: Systems Engineering — Fundación Universitaria Colombo Internacional (2019 – 2024).

card4.title: Focus
texts: Designing scalable solutions with maintainable code and software engineering best practices.
Experience with Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, EventBridge, OpenSearch and Amazon SES.
Active participation in technical design and feature evolution within agile teams.

tecnologies.title: Technologies
tecnologies.subtitle: Stack I use daily on real projects

Contact.title: Let's Connect
Contact.text: Send me a message and let's schedule a call!
Contact.whatsappMessage: Hi, I saw your portfolio and I'm interested in working with you.

Projects.title: Featured
Projects.subtitle: projects
Projects.intro: ArcadeCore ecosystem: multi-app central backend with authentication, quiz, chat and admin frontends.

items.title: ArcadeCore API
items.description: Central backend of the Arcade ecosystem. REST API with Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL and Prisma. Multi-app JWT auth, server-side quiz challenges, WebSocket chat, leaderboard, player progression and admin panel.
items.devStack: Node.js · TypeScript · Express · Prisma · PostgreSQL · WebSocket · Supabase

items.title: Generic Login
items.description: Centralized authentication portal for the ecosystem. Login, registration and mandatory password change. Redirects to each SPA after authenticating against ArcadeCore with HttpOnly cookies per app.
items.devStack: Next.js · React · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS · Axios

items.title: English Challenge
items.description: Gamer SPA for real-time English challenges. Difficulty wheel, timed questions, XP, levels and global ranking. Consumes ArcadeCore challenge and progression API.
items.devStack: Next.js · React · Zustand · Framer Motion · Tailwind CSS

items.title: Arcade Chat
items.description: Real-time community chat with ephemeral global room, persistent direct messages, online presence and XP for connected time. WebSocket + REST client over ArcadeCore.
items.devStack: Next.js · React · Zustand · WebSocket · Framer Motion

items.title: Admin Dashboard
items.description: Admin panel to manage apps, users, questions, difficulties, images, audios and level messages for the Arcade ecosystem. Full CRUD with administrator authentication.
